info.name: Expenses Tracker API
info.description: Complete API collection for the Expenses Tracker application. Covers all endpoints across Auth, Users, Accounts, Budgets, Categories, Sub-Categories, Expenses, Transactions, Budget Transfers, Customers, and Associations controllers.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints — no auth token required.

item.name: Customers
Customer Data
item.description: Customer-scoped data listing and association retrieval endpoints.

item.name: Customer Associations
item.description: Customer association management endpoints for adding/removing linked entities.
Customer management endpoints with data listing and association subfolders.

item.name: Associations
item.description: Dedicated AssociationController endpoints for managing entity relationships by reference number.
